{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323011208E5885CD3C592178DCC0D"}"},"total":102},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7257855558379111183","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"质量不错，有当年熬夜追斗破的那种感觉了，番茄第一污我是认可的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689851248,"group_id":"7233333484465425460","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxnYx8RCyEK4KA0pGQhCV0ai/blHog7AylzxkzDhq4GN","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3644243038448695","user_name":"神情倨傲的柯德"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3644243038448695","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7233333484465425460","book_info":{"abstract":"【群像+奇幻冒险+轻松诙谐+严密逻辑+庞大世界观】硬核百万字玄幻文，非种田，无系统，多女主，亿点污，欢迎入坑。
我只是一个普通的魔法学者，只想安安静静地做魔法研究，研究透这剑与魔法大陆上的一切。

但我碰巧重生在了帝国的首富贵族家里，碰巧又被序列第三的神明选中成为降临身，碰巧从小就有一个忠诚温婉的兽耳女仆和一个喜欢撒娇的贵族未婚妻，碰巧又有那么亿点点魔法天赋……

我真的只想安静地做魔研，但第一次出远门游学就遇到顶级黑魔法组织绑架，之后又被卷入恐怖祭祀，甚至还不小心与传说中的原初恶魔面对面硬刚……


白浩是大夏最年轻的天才理科博士，原本有着光明的未来，但在世界毁灭前被月神选中，在异世界重生成为魔法天才学者。
    这里是剑与魔法的世界，有魔法上限极高的人族、擅长锻造的矮人族、肉体强悍的兽人族、寿命极长的精灵族以及生活在水下的海妖族……
各族在神明制定的秩序里合纵连横，然而战争不停，杀伐不断，诸魔降临，末世将近，大陆各处尽是混乱与不堪。

开局顶配，自带老婆，背靠神明，纵横异世，洞悉一切，破除万邪。
如果恐惧来源于未知与无能，全知全能将会毫无畏惧，而无所畏惧者将真正无敌。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o96e16faffe2d070d1f9d4a488e1e326a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"昨夜的月牙","author_id":"","book_id":"7233333484465425460","book_name":"在剑与魔法的世界当学者","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8b890","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1170人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1141,"name":"西方奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1141&name=西方奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":6,"name":"奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=6&name=奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7233358488624169509","read_count":"1170","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1660388"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.0","serial_count":"777","tags":"西方奇幻,奇幻仙侠,奇幻,玄幻,重生,多女主,搞笑轻松,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/36d0e25a506b3064cae5befee590202e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383528&x-signature=tDEfQRVz%2BkPQqd5IM22CGdw5s2E%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1275852434976500","extra":{"comment_jump
